name: Dump Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Cherry pie filling or any kind you desire
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the cherry pie filling in the bottom of a 9x13 inch dish.
2. Spread the crushed pineapple over the cherries.
3. Sprinkle the yellow cake mix on top of the pineapple mixture.
4. Melt the butter and pour it evenly over the cake mix.
5. Top with coconut and nuts.
6. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
